comment: Honest all-source coverage baseline (ratcheted 2026-07-20 from the 2026-07-12 baseline). Consumed by vitest.config.js (enforced floor) and scripts/check-coverage-ratchet.mjs (auto-ratchet: fails CI when achieved coverage exceeds a floor by more than `ratchetSlackPoints`, forcing the floor to be raised). Never remove files from coverage `include` to satisfy this gate.
